question_template: If the UGV follows the proposed trajectory, what fraction of the route will it complete before an infraction?
answer_rule: Simulate proposed trajectory; compute route completion until collision/off-road/red-light infraction.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
